message:
fix(channel/oneshot): take pending value inside lock scope on Receiver drop

The Receiver::drop impl previously set receiver_dropped and cleared the
waker but never took the pending value from the inner state. If a Sender
had already placed a value, the T remained in the Mutex-protected inner
struct until the Arc was deallocated — which could be arbitrarily delayed
if the Sender half was still alive.

Now inner.value.take() runs inside the lock scope during drop, ensuring:
1. The value's Drop impl runs predictably at receiver-drop time
2. Memory for the stored T is freed immediately
3. The value is dropped AFTER the lock is released (_value binding keeps
   it alive through the lock scope, drops at end of drop())

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
